vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ và bùng nổ
vocab.example: I remember my friends and I used to have a blast building secret forts in the backyard every summer.

vocab.meaning: khao khát những điều lớn lao/mơ mộng viển vông
vocab.example: During our role-playing games, I’d always reach for the stars, imagining I was an astronaut exploring distant galaxies.

vocab.meaning: vô tư, không bị kiểm soát (thường dùng cho các trò chơi nghịch ngợm)
vocab.example: Our playground football matches were a bit wild and woolly, but they were the highlight of my week.

vocab.meaning: làm cho ai đó phải luôn bận rộn/tập trung cao độ
vocab.example: Playing tag was a favorite activity because it really kept everyone on their toes and improved our agility.
I was absolutely over the moon whenever my father agreed to take me fishing at the local lake.

vocab.meaning: tự phát/không chuẩn bị trước (thường dùng cho việc sáng tạo trò chơi)
vocab.example: Most of our favorite childhood games were made up off the cuff using nothing but a ball and some imagination.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui/sự thú vị từ việc gì đó
vocab.example: I used to get a real kick out of collecting rare stamps and organizing them in my colorful album.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.meaning: trong nháy mắt (ám chỉ thời gian trôi nhanh khi đang chơi vui)
vocab.example: When we were playing hide-and-seek, the entire afternoon seemed to pass in the blink of an eye.

vocab.meaning: thử làm một điều gì đó mới mẻ
vocab.example: Whenever a new board game came out, my siblings and I were always eager to give it a whirl.

vocab.meaning: trên chín tầng mây/cực kỳ sung sướng
vocab.example: Winning a school race left me on cloud nine for days, as running was my absolute favorite pastime.
